receiveMessage(bytes,bytes).details: Receives a message in the full MessageV2 format.      In real CCTP, this verifies Circle's attestation signature.      Here we skip attestation verification but validate the message format.

params.attestation: Ignored in mock (real CCTP requires valid signature)

returns.success: Whether the message was successfully processed
